nodes.label: AI adapting to character voice
nodes.grounding_span: generating text-to-speech to use as narration

nodes.label: AI as efficient complete solution provider
nodes.label_negative: AI writing independently at lower quality
nodes.grounding_span: help me synthesize information from multiple sources, or to help me make a long paragraph more concise

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: treat AI like a personal assistant who looks over something and gives me feedback

nodes.label: AI alignment with personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: the 'voice' that the AI writes with comes across more as a marketing or salesperson rather than an instructor

nodes.label: AI as research assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI doing all instructional design work
nodes.grounding_span: use AI to help me analyze large sets of documentation to help me do instructional and task analysis

nodes.label: Production efficiency and reduced frustration
nodes.grounding_span: reduce my production time by about half, which in turn helps reduce my own boredom and frustration

nodes.label: Instructional quality and authentic voice
nodes.grounding_span: the 'voice' that the AI writes with comes across more as a marketing or salesperson rather than an instructor

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: focus on the more high value tasks that I use at work

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI text-to-speech adoption
nodes.grounding_span: Text-to-speech has allowed me to reduce my production time by about half

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's marketing tone in instructional writing
nodes.grounding_span: It came across as a bit too juvenile, or like it was written by someone who wrote a cheesy Marvel movie

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI
nodes.grounding_span: I don't trust AI to write anything for me at my same level of quality, but I will use it as a tool

nodes.label: Systematic workflow decomposition — breaks tasks into sub-steps with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I'll feed the handbook to the AI and ask it to give me a summary of all the major topics... then I'll have the AI model highlight the main tasks

nodes.label: Selective and independent AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: I was slow to adopt it because, historically, the quality was never good enough compared to my own voice
